overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a yellow leopard-print wingsuit flying through a desert canyon at sunset. The character navigates snow-dusted ridges and deep red rock canyons with hot air balloons visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-dusted mountain ridge with coniferous forest

events.description: hot air balloons become visible in the distance against the purple sky
character banks left to follow the canyon contour, moving away from snow-covered slope

agents.ego_description: flying in wingsuit along the mountain ridge, maintaining speed and altitude while navigating near the terrain

entered.detail: mountain slope with patches of snow and exposed red rock
scattered evergreen trees on the mountainside
tall red rock formation rising above the canyon
colorful hot air balloons floating in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with wingsuit flight along a snow-dusted mountain ridge. Coniferous trees dot the right slope while a vast canyon opens to the left. Hot air balloons appear in the distance as the character banks left to follow the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with layered rock formations

events.description: moving from ridge line into open canyon airspace with expansive views
gentle right bank to follow the curving canyon wall

agents.ego_description: soaring through the open canyon, adjusting trajectory to follow the terrain contours

entered.detail: flat-topped rock formations visible on the horizon
striated red and orange canyon walls showing geological layers

segments.scene_description: The flight continues into a wide-open canyon with dramatic red rock formations. The snow-covered ridge falls behind as the character soars past layered canyon walls, with distant mesas visible under the purple dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon with steep rock walls and winding floor paths

events.description: canyon floor with winding dirt road becomes visible below

agents.ego_description: executing proximity flight along the canyon wall, descending gradually toward the canyon floor

entered.detail: sandy canyon bottom with sparse vegetation
narrow dirt path winding through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment features low-altitude proximity flying along the steep canyon wall. The character descends toward the canyon floor where a winding dirt path is visible, while the hot air balloons and distant vistas fade from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous wingsuit flight that transitions from a snowy mountain ridge into the depths of a red rock canyon at dusk. It begins by gliding along a snow-dusted ridge dotted with coniferous trees, banking left as a vast canyon opens up and hot air balloons appear in the distance. As the snow-covered terrain falls behind, the scene expands into a wide-open expanse of dramatic red rock formations and layered canyon walls under a purple sky. The flight then shifts toward a low-altitude descent, skimming the steep canyon walls before finally approaching the canyon floor where a winding dirt path becomes visible.
